name: patient-banner
title: Patient Banner
description: Compact patient-context header with demographics, MRN, inline allergy list, and action slots.

props.name: dob
props.description: If given, age is derived and both are shown ("34y · 12 Mar 1992").

props.name: age
props.description: Used when dob is not provided.

props.name: mrn
props.description: Medical record number / patient ID, rendered monospaced.

props.name: allergies
props.description: Renders an AllergyList inline (max 3; compact caps at 1).

props.name: tags
props.description: Free slot, e.g. pregnancy status or insurance plan badges.

props.name: variant
props.description: compact is a single line for sticky headers.

clinicalNotes: Wraps in a <header aria-label="Patient information"> — it's the patient-context landmark for the whole screen, the guard against wrong-patient actions. When dob is given, both derived age and full date of birth are shown: age is what clinicians reason with, DOB is the identity check. MRN stays monospaced and visible for verbal read-back verification. Allergies ride in the banner (severe-first, overflow-collapsed) because allergy status must be visible wherever orders can be placed; the compact variant still keeps one chip on ≥sm screens.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Composes AllergyList (not raw badges) per the petals_ui H01 spec.
